private_companion.purpose: Private brain repo with the full corpus + ascended-tier agents (learn_new, swarm_factory). Authenticated visitors with read access to kody-w/twin-private get full ascended-twin voice, private memory, private agents, and per-user memory via Issues. Anonymous visitors see only public seed-level identity + their browser's local memory.

auth.scope_required: repo (or fine-grained Contents: Read on the private_companion repo)
